_placeholder: P3-E4 (ADR-0018 rollout phase/profile/comparison) and P3-E5 (ADR-0019 publication marker) own the final field definitions. This doc proves ONLY that the six named-consumer signals (D-017/B5) are representable as STRUCTURED DATA today — typed values under named keys, never inferred from message bodies, labels, or rule names. Its apiVersion is deliberately NOT the frozen contract group, so schemas/fixtures_validate_test.go skips it (no frozen schema is force-applied to a field a later epic still owns).
